narrative:
Washington Township has 1,269 registered voters, with 47.3% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 45.5% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 7.2%, a pronounced Republican lean of 38.4 percentage points.
